reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Academy hall color rhythm, duel staging, card layout balance, and warm-versus-cool lighting anchor.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette, costume layering, hand pose, and magical focus posture anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the base panel and switch atlas slices for idle, good, perfect, and streak-highlight states.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_round_combo_panel_180x64.png through AssetServer and build a four-frame atlas for the upper-left feedback panel.
runtime_notes: Panel anchors to the upper-left safe area with a 40 px inset.
Verdict flashes can play on top of the base panel without changing widget size.
Combo updates should complete inside one second so the next telegraph remains readable.

context.usage: Upper-left panel that shows round label, combo count, and perfect or good result flashes.

shape.silhouette: Compact framed panel with a round plate, combo digits, and a short verdict flash field.

specs.lighting: Cyan and lime verdict flashes sit on a navy plate with gold border highlights.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 720x64 px with four 180x64 frames.
Combo digit field remains at least 72 px wide so two-digit streak counts fit cleanly.
Verdict flash occupies less than 40 percent of the panel width and never hides the round label plate.
